Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Global Warming Has Accelerated Significantly 65 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. Stupidly Obscure Programming in a Troubled Time (2018) 17 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Xous security focused open source on 22nm custom silicon 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. Analytic Fog Rendering with Volumetric Primitives 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. A GitHub Issue Title Compromised 4k Developer Machines 527 upvotes, 166 comments
  7. Screeching Sound of Peeling Tape 43 upvotes, 8 comments
  8. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 139 upvotes, 38 comments
  9. Show HN: Swarm – Program a colony of 200 ants using a custom assembly language 129 upvotes, 36 comments
  10. Wikipedia was in read-only mode following mass admin account compromise 1008 upvotes, 365 comments
  11. Image manipulation with convolution using Julia 22 upvotes, 3 comments
  12. A standard protocol to handle and discard low-effort, AI-Generated pull requests 240 upvotes, 82 comments
  13. LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor 130 upvotes, 42 comments
  14. "I'm obviously taking a risk here by advertising emoji directly." 26 upvotes, 5 comments
  15. GPL upgrades via section 14 proxy delegation 82 upvotes, 29 comments
  16. I Dropped Our Production Database and Now Pay 10% More for AWS 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  17. 10% of Firefox crashes are caused by bitflips 771 upvotes, 379 comments
  18. Good software knows when to stop 494 upvotes, 250 comments
  19. Payphone Go 49 upvotes, 18 comments
  20. Workers who love 'synergizing paradigms' might be bad at their jobs 132 upvotes, 62 comments
  21. System76 on Age Verification Laws 605 upvotes, 398 comments
  22. CT Scans of Health Wearables 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. GPT-5.4 908 upvotes, 716 comments
  24. The Brand Age 399 upvotes, 323 comments
  25. US economy unexpectedly sheds 92,000 jobs in February 158 upvotes, 117 comments
  26. Why Going to Mars Would Be Bad for Your Health 11 upvotes, 5 comments
  27. Where things stand with the Department of War 541 upvotes, 625 comments
  28. AI and the Ship of Theseus 147 upvotes, 152 comments
  29. Labor market impacts of AI: A new measure and early evidence 260 upvotes, 401 comments
  30. Stardex (YC S21) is hiring customer success engineers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 11:00pm, 6 March 2026. Source here.
